description: SchoolDigger provides data and rankings for U.S. K-12 schools and school districts, including enrollment, demographics, test scores, finance, and attendance boundaries. Its service is used to compare schools and integrate school and district data into other applications.
summary: SchoolDigger exposes one authenticated REST API for U.S. K-12 school and district data, documented interactively at developer.schooldigger.com with machine-readable Swagger/OpenAPI specs at api.schooldigger.com.
